metadata.description: Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace

properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# Delivery Optimization Monitor
---
Monitora l'utilizzo della Delivery Optimization su tutti i client."},"name":"title"},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"timeRange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","type":4,"isRequired":true,"value":{"durationMs":604800000},"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000}]}}]},"name":"parameters"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DOStatus_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize TotalPeers=sum(BytesFromPeers), TotalHttp=sum(BytesFromHttp), TotalCache=sum(BytesFromCacheServer)
| extend TotalAll = TotalPeers + TotalHttp + TotalCache
| project Source="Peers", Bytes=TotalPeers
| union (DOStatus_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Bytes=sum(BytesFromHttp) | project Source="HTTP/CDN", Bytes)
| union (DOStatus_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Bytes=sum(BytesFromCacheServer) | project Source="Cache Server", Bytes)","size":1,"title":"📊 Distribuzione traffico per sorgente","queryType":0,"visualization":"piechart"},"name":"trafficDistribution"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DOStatus_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize PeerBytes=sum(BytesFromPeers), HttpBytes=sum(BytesFromHttp), CacheBytes=sum(BytesFromCacheServer) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| extend PeerMB=round(PeerBytes/1048576.0, 2), HttpMB=round(HttpBytes/1048576.0, 2), CacheMB=round(CacheBytes/1048576.0, 2)","size":0,"title":"📈 Trend giornaliero traffico (MB)","queryType":0,"visualization":"linechart"},"name":"dailyTrend"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DOStatus_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize TotalBytes=sum(TotalBytesDownloaded), PeerBytes=sum(BytesFromPeers), HttpBytes=sum(BytesFromHttp), CacheBytes=sum(BytesFromCacheServer), JobCount=count() by DeviceName
| extend PeerPct=round(100.0*PeerBytes/TotalBytes, 1), TotalMB=round(TotalBytes/1048576.0, 2)
| order by TotalBytes desc
| take 50","size":0,"title":"🖥️ Top 50 device per traffico","queryType":0,"visualization":"table"},"name":"topDevices"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DOStatus_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize TotalBytes=sum(TotalBytesDownloaded), PeerBytes=sum(BytesFromPeers) by FileName
| extend PeerPct=round(100.0*PeerBytes/TotalBytes, 1), TotalMB=round(TotalBytes/1048576.0, 2)
| where TotalBytes > 0
| order by TotalBytes desc
| take 20","size":0,"title":"📦 Top 20 file per dimensione download","queryType":0,"visualization":"table"},"name":"topFiles"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DOStatus_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize DeviceCount=dcount(DeviceName) by DownloadMode
| order by DeviceCount desc","size":1,"title":"⚙️ Download Mode per device","queryType":0,"visualization":"barchart"},"name":"downloadModes"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DOStatus_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize PeerBytes=sum(BytesFromPeers), HttpBytes=sum(BytesFromHttp)
| extend BandwidthSavedMB=round(PeerBytes/1048576.0, 2), BandwidthSavedPct=round(100.0*PeerBytes/(PeerBytes+HttpBytes), 1)","size":4,"title":"💰 Banda risparmiata tramite P2P","queryType":0,"visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"titleContent":{"columnMatch":"BandwidthSavedPct","formatter":1},"subtitleContent":{"columnMatch":"BandwidthSavedMB"}}},"name":"bandwidthSaved"}],"isLocked":false}
